How trade-in works
How trade-in works
1. Upgrade and save
Accept your estimated trade-in value, buy your new device at the current price, and receive your delivery.
2. Prepare device
Sign out of all accounts linked to your old device, and factory reset it to erase your personal information.
3. Ship within 30 days
Print your shipping label, package your old device, and drop it off at any UPS location within 30 days of receiving your new device.
4. Get your rebate
After we receive your trade-in device, we'll verify it within 10 business days. Once verified, you'll receive your trade-in value as an Amazon.com Gift Card to your Amazon account for immediate use.

About this item

  • BIG. BRIGHT. SMOOTH : Enjoy every scroll, swipe and stream on a stunning 6.7” wide display that’s as smooth for scrolling as it is immersive.¹
  • OUTSIDE NOISE? NOT YOUR PROBLEM: Hear what you want and not what you don’t with improved Active Noise Cancellation¹,². And, when you wish to enjoy your audio while staying aware of your surroundings, switch to the Ambient mode and you’re set.
  • LIGHTWEIGHT DESIGN, EVERYDAY EASE: With a lightweight build and slim profile, Galaxy S25 FE is made for life on the go. It is powerful and portable and won't weigh you down no matter where your day takes you.
  • YOUR EVERYDAY SOUND, NOW MORE POWERFUL: Galaxy Buds3 FE pack a bigger¹ 11mm dynamic speaker with deep bass and powerful sound that make everything from daily commutes to weekend playlists sound amazing.
  • SELFIES THAT STUN: Every selfie’s a standout with Galaxy S25 FE. Snap sharp shots and vivid videos thanks to the 12MP selfie camera with ProVisual Engine.
  • EVERY CALL, LOUD AND CLEAR: Confidently hear and be heard on phone calls with family and friends, thanks to the added microphone and enhanced background noise reduction¹ on Galaxy Buds3 FE.
  • MOVE IT. REMOVE IT. IMPROVE IT: Generative Edit² on Galaxy S25 FE lets you move, resize and erase distracting elements in your shot. Galaxy AI intuitively recreates every detail so each shot looks exactly the way you envisioned.³
  • UNINTERRUPTED AUDIO WITH A LONG-LASTING BATTERY: Go long between charges with a long-lasting battery³. And, when it’s time to recharge, do it quickly and get right back on track.
  • MORE POWER. LESS PLUGGING IN⁵: Busy day? No worries. Galaxy S25 FE is built with a powerful 4,900mAh battery that’s ready to go the distance⁴. And when you need a top off, Super Fast Charging 2.0⁵ gets you back in action.
  • TALK TO GEMINI, HANDS-FREE: With hands-free access to Gemini⁴, smart assistance is always within earshot. No need to reach for your phone anymore as Galaxy Buds3 FE let you get help on the go, just by using your voice.⁵
Show more
› See more product details

1 of Samsung Galaxy S25 FE Cell Phone (2025), 128GB AI Smartphone, Unlocked Android, Large Display, 4900mAh Battery, High Res-Camera, AI Photo Edits, Durable, US 1 Yr Warranty, Icyblue
1095
$549.99
  • BIG. BRIGHT. SMOOTH : Enjoy every scroll, swipe and stream on a stunning 6.7” wide display that’s as smooth for scrolling as it is immersive.¹
  • LIGHTWEIGHT DESIGN, EVERYDAY EASE: With a lightweight build and slim profile, Galaxy S25 FE is made for life on the go. It is powerful and portable and won't weigh you down no matter where your day takes you.
  • SELFIES THAT STUN: Every selfie’s a standout with Galaxy S25 FE. Snap sharp shots and vivid videos thanks to the 12MP selfie camera with ProVisual Engine.
  • MOVE IT. REMOVE IT. IMPROVE IT: Generative Edit² on Galaxy S25 FE lets you move, resize and erase distracting elements in your shot. Galaxy AI intuitively recreates every detail so each shot looks exactly the way you envisioned.³
  • MORE POWER. LESS PLUGGING IN⁵: Busy day? No worries. Galaxy S25 FE is built with a powerful 4,900mAh battery that’s ready to go the distance⁴. And when you need a top off, Super Fast Charging 2.0⁵ gets you back in action.
  • PACKED WITH STRENGTH, FOR YOUR EVERYDAY: Life happens. That’s why Galaxy S25 FE is built with a sturdy Armor Aluminum frame and Gorilla Glass Victus+ to handle life’s everyday wear and tear.⁶
  • POWERFUL PERFORMANCE, NOW ACCESSIBLE: You shouldn’t feel like your phone’s holding you back. Galaxy S25 FE speeds things up with a premium chipset and keeps your day going with sustained performance, thanks to its improved cooling system.
  • SHOW GEMINI, GET INSTANT HELP: Sometimes it’s easier to show than explain.⁷ Go live with Google Gemini and share your camera to get helpful real-time answers from your smart assistant.
  • SEE IT BIG. HEAR IT BETTER: Pair the powerful sound of your Galaxy Buds3 FE with the wide and vibrant display of your Galaxy S25 FE⁸ for a truly immersive experience. They bring every movie, video and game to life.
1 of SAMSUNG Galaxy Buds 3 FE (2025) True Wireless Bluetooth Earbuds, Active Noise Cancellation, Powerful Sound, Clear Calls, Long Lasting Battery, Hands Free AI, Black [US Version, 2 Year Warranty]
1079
$112.87
  • OUTSIDE NOISE? NOT YOUR PROBLEM: Hear what you want and not what you don’t with improved Active Noise Cancellation¹,². And, when you wish to enjoy your audio while staying aware of your surroundings, switch to the Ambient mode and you’re set.
  • YOUR EVERYDAY SOUND, NOW MORE POWERFUL: Galaxy Buds3 FE pack a bigger¹ 11mm dynamic speaker with deep bass and powerful sound that make everything from daily commutes to weekend playlists sound amazing.
  • EVERY CALL, LOUD AND CLEAR: Confidently hear and be heard on phone calls with family and friends, thanks to the added microphone and enhanced background noise reduction¹ on Galaxy Buds3 FE.
  • UNINTERRUPTED AUDIO WITH A LONG-LASTING BATTERY: Go long between charges with a long-lasting battery³. And, when it’s time to recharge, do it quickly and get right back on track.
  • TALK TO GEMINI, HANDS-FREE: With hands-free access to Gemini⁴, smart assistance is always within earshot. No need to reach for your phone anymore as Galaxy Buds3 FE let you get help on the go, just by using your voice.⁵
  • MOVE BETWEEN YOUR GALAXY DEVICES. YOUR BUDS FOLLOW: Seamlessly connect and switch between your Galaxy devices. Galaxy Buds3 FE pair⁶ effortlessly and automatically switch between your phone to Tab to PC, as per your needs.⁷
  • CONTROL AT YOUR FINGERTIPS: Play your audio, pause it and answer calls with a simple pinch on your Buds3 FE, and just swipe the blade to adjust volume, thanks to the intuitive controls.
  • YOUR PERSONAL TRANSLATOR, IN REAL-TIME: Hear translations through your Galaxy Buds3 FE during face-to-face conversations. Now chat easily with new neighbors who speak a different language, or with locals while you are traveling.⁸
  • NO BUDS LEFT BEHIND: Not sure where your Buds are? Find My Earbuds will lead you to their last location.⁹ Track the last location your Buds connected to your phone and then see it on a map.¹⁰

Product Description

Galaxy S25 FE’s advanced camera, vivid display and long lasting battery meet Buds 3 FE’s wireless freedom, active noise cancellation and premium sound. Capture every detail with the pro-grade camera on Galaxy S25 FE and stay in the zone with rich and balanced sound on Buds 3 FE.

How customer reviews and ratings work

Customer Reviews, including Product Star Ratings help customers to learn more about the product and decide whether it is the right product for them.

To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyzed reviews to verify trustworthiness.

Learn more how customers reviews work on Amazon

About this Item

  • BIG. BRIGHT. SMOOTH : Enjoy every scroll, swipe and stream on a stunning 6.7” wide display that’s as smooth for scrolling as it is immersive.¹
  • OUTSIDE NOISE? NOT YOUR PROBLEM: Hear what you want and not what you don’t with improved Active Noise Cancellation¹,². And, when you wish to enjoy your audio while staying aware of your surroundings, switch to the Ambient mode and you’re set.
  • LIGHTWEIGHT DESIGN, EVERYDAY EASE: With a lightweight build and slim profile, Galaxy S25 FE is made for life on the go. It is powerful and portable and won't weigh you down no matter where your day takes you.
  • YOUR EVERYDAY SOUND, NOW MORE POWERFUL: Galaxy Buds3 FE pack a bigger¹ 11mm dynamic speaker with deep bass and powerful sound that make everything from daily commutes to weekend playlists sound amazing.
  • SELFIES THAT STUN: Every selfie’s a standout with Galaxy S25 FE. Snap sharp shots and vivid videos thanks to the 12MP selfie camera with ProVisual Engine.
  • EVERY CALL, LOUD AND CLEAR: Confidently hear and be heard on phone calls with family and friends, thanks to the added microphone and enhanced background noise reduction¹ on Galaxy Buds3 FE.
  • MOVE IT. REMOVE IT. IMPROVE IT: Generative Edit² on Galaxy S25 FE lets you move, resize and erase distracting elements in your shot. Galaxy AI intuitively recreates every detail so each shot looks exactly the way you envisioned.³
  • UNINTERRUPTED AUDIO WITH A LONG-LASTING BATTERY: Go long between charges with a long-lasting battery³. And, when it’s time to recharge, do it quickly and get right back on track.
  • MORE POWER. LESS PLUGGING IN⁵: Busy day? No worries. Galaxy S25 FE is built with a powerful 4,900mAh battery that’s ready to go the distance⁴. And when you need a top off, Super Fast Charging 2.0⁵ gets you back in action.
  • TALK TO GEMINI, HANDS-FREE: With hands-free access to Gemini⁴, smart assistance is always within earshot. No need to reach for your phone anymore as Galaxy Buds3 FE let you get help on the go, just by using your voice.⁵

Product Description

Galaxy S25 FE’s advanced camera, vivid display and long lasting battery meet Buds 3 FE’s wireless freedom, active noise cancellation and premium sound. Capture every detail with the pro-grade camera on Galaxy S25 FE and stay in the zone with rich and balanced sound on Buds 3 FE.
